---
title: "Station_Selection"
output: html_document
---

## Objective
Select suited stations for the analysis in Europe and North America. Stations are being selected based on the following criteria:

1. Recording for at least 15 years
2. Temperature measurements, GPP_DT_VUT_REF and GPP_NT_VUT_REF do not miss more then 5% of the time

Libraries
```{R}
library(data.table)
library(arrow)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
```

## CSV-Files to parquet files for relevant sites
Convert all csv-files in fluxdatakit 2015 in parquet files
```{R}
input_dir <- "../data_raw/all_fdk_sites"
output_dir <- "../data_raw/all_fdk_sites_parquet"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

files <- list.files(
  input_dir,
  pattern = "^FLX_.*\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

for (f in files) {

  message("Processing: ", basename(f))

  # 1. CSV schnell einlesen
  dt <- fread(f)

  # 2. Zusatzspalten
  dt[, source_file := basename(f)]

  dt[, site_id := str_extract(
    basename(f),
    "(?<=FLX_)[A-Z]{2}-[A-Za-z0-9]+(?=_FLUXDATAKIT)"
  )]

  # 3. Zielpfad pro Datei (Parquet file)
  out_file <- file.path(
    output_dir,
    paste0(tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(f)), ".parquet")
  )

  # 4. Schreiben als Parquet
  write_parquet(dt, out_file)

  # 5. Speicher freigeben
  rm(dt)
  gc()
}
``` 

Filter relevant parquet files
```{R}
# read in daily data
files <- list.files(
  "../data_raw/all_fdk_sites_parquet",
  pattern = "_DD_.*\\.parquet$",
  full.names = TRUE
)
ds <- open_dataset(files)

# filter to relevant data fields
ds <- ds |>
  select(
    TIMESTAMP,
    site_id,
    TA_F_MDS,
    TA_F_MDS_QC,
    TMIN_F_MDS,
    TMAX_F_MDS,
    GPP_NT_VUT_REF,
    GPP_DT_VUT_REF
  )

# filter out all sites with >15 years recordings
site_years <- ds |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP)) |>
  group_by(site_id) |>
  summarise(
    start = min(date, na.rm = TRUE),
    end   = max(date, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  collect()
site_years <- site_years |>
  mutate(
    years = as.numeric(difftime(end, start, units = "days")) / 365.25
  )

valid_sites <- site_years |>
  filter(years >= 15) |>
  pull(site_id)

filtered_ds <- ds |>
  filter(site_id %in% valid_sites)

# save filter data in data folder as parquet files
dir.create("../data/data_fdk_parquet", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write_dataset(
  filtered_ds,
  "../data/data_fdk_parquet")

```

### Read in parquet file as data frame
```{R}
df_valid_stations <- read_parquet("../data/data_fdk_parquet/fdk.parquet")
```
